name: Kozo Keikaku Engineering Inc.
summary: Kozo Keikaku Engineering Inc. provides IT services in the information and communication, construction, manufacturing, and decision-making support fields in Japan. The company offers base isolation, vibration control, seismic damping, structural design and supervision of super-high-rise buildings disaster preparedness, and disaster mitigation services. It is also involved in software development for system development projects, such as large scale mobile communications, bus operations control, mobile inspection, examination of next generation wireless telecommunication system, radio wave propagation analysis, and electromagnetic field analysis consulting, as well as sells related products in the information and telecommunication field. In addition, the company offers quality management, design support, scheduling optimization, and logistics analysis solutions. Further, it conducts scientific studies in evacuation planning, risk communication, behavior evaluation, and housing history management services in the decision-making support field. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
